_README: SAMPLE ONLY — do not consume directly. Copy the 'hooks' block below into the project's .claude/settings.json (or merge it). Project-level Claude config is a protected path under this repo's policy, so the agent does not install this file itself; jlcbk owns the install. The committed rollout default is 'audit' (see scripts/hooks/config.json), so installing this sample alone does NOT block anything until the mode is raised.

hooks._note: Use the _windows_command variant on the Windows PowerShell workspace.

_enabling_modes.audit: default; no change needed. Findings only.
_enabling_modes.pretool-enforce: export SELF_EVO_ROLLOUT_MODE=pretool-enforce, or set rollout_mode in scripts/hooks/config.json. PreToolUse blocks; Stop stays advisory.
_enabling_modes.full-enforce: export SELF_EVO_ROLLOUT_MODE=full-enforce. Both hooks may block. Enable only after reviewing audit findings.

_rollback: Set SELF_EVO_ROLLOUT_MODE=audit, or delete the hooks block from .claude/settings.json and restart Claude Code. SELF_EVO_STOP_GUARD=1 escapes a Stop loop.
